1.content:
When Marge finds out from both Lisa and Milhouse that Bart is marrying Mary. She decided stop the wedding but knows that the cow will be sent to the slaughterhouse if the deal is broken. How does Marge stop the wedding and save the cow?

(a) like in the episode she convinces Bart in to not marrying Mary by saying that they'll send his cow to India, but they need Homer to temporarily take the cows place.

(b) Marge tries to force Bart into not marrying Mary by having him watch Maggie the whole time he's dating Mary, and hopes that Maggie will be too much for Bart to handle. Once the wedding is off they send his cow to India, but they need Homer to temporarily take the cows place.

(c) Marge tries to force Bart into not marrying Mary by having him watch Maggie the whole time he's dating Mary, and hopes that Maggie will be too much for Bart to handle. Marge ultimately failed because she forgot one huge detail that Mary has a lot of older and younger siblings, and so making Bart watch Maggie had no effect at all.

(d) Marge tries to force Bart into not marrying Mary by having him watch Maggie the whole time he's dating Mary, and hopes that Maggie will be too much for Bart to handle. To Marge's surprise this plan backfired because now Bart wasn't the only one who had a crush on one of Cletus's kids, because Marge finds out that Maggie has a crush on Mary's baby brother Embry.
1.title: Operation stop the wedding but save the cow

info.description: It all started when Bart meets Mary and encourages him that he can get his calf to win. So Bart soon starts having a crush on her that only grows after he finds out that the winning cows are sent to the slaughterhouse. So he asks Lisa if she'll help him take his cow Lou to Spuckler's farm. So once at the farm Bart gives Lou to his crush Mary. Cletus sees Bart's gift to Mary as a marriage proposal. How does Marge stop Bart from getting married to Mary but still be able to Bart's cow Lou alive? Does her one plan backfire causing not only Bart to get married to Mary, but now Maggie has a crush on Mary's baby brother Embry?
